message:
fix: bridge finalizer_count truncation and CRDT version overflow

distributed/bridge.rs: finalizer_count() returns usize, cast to u32
via `as u32` could silently truncate on 64-bit platforms. Changed to
u32::try_from with unwrap_or(u32::MAX).

trace/distributed/crdt.rs: MVRegister::set used plain `+= 1` on version
counter which panics on overflow in debug mode. Changed to saturating_add,
consistent with GCounter::increment and ORSet::add in the same file.

Also records batch 412 audits: 9 files (~10K lines) including
server/shutdown.rs, blocking_pool.rs, io_uring.rs, ambient_authority.rs,
boundary.rs, entropy.rs — all SOUND.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -743,7 +743,7 @@ impl RegionBridge {
             sequence: self.sequence,
             tasks,
             children: self.local.child_ids(),
-            finalizer_count: self.local.finalizer_count() as u32,
+            finalizer_count: u32::try_from(self.local.finalizer_count()).unwrap_or(u32::MAX),
             budget: self.local.budget().to_distributed(),
             cancel_reason: self
                 .local
